reference: THE WILDERNESS WITH ITS LURKING FOES AND THE EVER PRESENT DREAD OF HUNGER AND THIRST DEEPENED HIS SENSE OF NEED AND OF DEPENDENCE UPON A POWER ABLE TO GUIDE THE DESTINIES OF MEN
text: the wilderness with its lurking folds the ever-present dread of hunger and thirst deepens its sense of need and of dependence upon a power able to guide the death's needs of men
